_instructions.note: This file is for development/testing only
setup: 1. Fill in the 'sharedPassword' field with a password that all test users share
2. Add more test users to the 'testUsers' array as needed
3. Make sure all test users in your Supabase database have the same password
4. Set 'enableTestUserDropdown' to false to hide the dropdown in production
_instructions.security: Keep passwords simple for testing. Never use production passwords here.
